degree_class: Not found in checked official catalogue/programme page [uncertain].
school_specific_admission_rule: Laurea Magistrale admission is evaluated by study area/school and applicant qualification route; programme-specific educational regulations may add curricular requirements.
application_platform: Politecnico di Milano Online Services; non-EU pre-enrolment/visa route may also require Universitaly [uncertain].

application_round.summary: For foreign qualifications in Architecture and Design: September 2026 general call 1 Oct 2025-29 Jan 2026; additional call for EEA and non-EEA resident in Italy 27 Feb-31 Mar 2026. Italian-qualification Semester I application window is 22 Jun-7 Jul 2026 by 12:00 CEST [verify school-specific guide].

intake_semester_availability: September 2026 intake; February 2027 intake is listed for Engineering in the foreign-qualification deadlines, subject to programme availability.
admission_outcome_type: application evaluation outcome [wording varies by route]
ranking_methodology: Academic evaluation criteria are programme/school-specific. Use programme educational regulations and school admission guide for direct admission, evaluation, portfolio, interview, or integration rules [uncertain].
places_and_foreign_contingent: Not resolved from checked official sources for this programme; verify programme call/regulations [uncertain].
academic_requirements: Applicants need a first-level university degree or may apply as final-year students under Polimi rules; Italian-qualification page mentions final-year students with 145 certified ECTS. Each programme may have specific admission requirements in educational regulations.
country_specific_eligibility: Foreign qualification eligibility and any country-specific minimum GPA/qualification rule must be checked through Polimi foreign-qualification application pages and programme evaluation [uncertain].
curricular_integration_policy: Programme/school evaluation may require curricular integrations or single courses before/after admission depending on the applicant background [uncertain].
conditional_enrolment_policy: Conditional enrolment may apply if the first-level degree is completed after the enrolment deadline but before Polimi route-specific final dates; exact date depends on applicant route and semester.
language_requirements: For Laurea Magistrale admission, Polimi requires recognised English certification. The 2026/2027 language page lists examples including TOEFL iBT >= 78, IELTS >= 6, Cambridge B2 First Grade B or C1 Advanced Grade C, and equivalent accepted tests, subject to validity rules.
language_submission_timing: English certificate must be provided by the admission deadline/upload timing indicated in the relevant Polimi application route.
post_admission_italian_requirement: International students admitted to English-language Laurea Magistrale programmes must satisfy an Italian language/OFA obligation before final exam completion.

application_deadline_eu.summary: For foreign qualifications in Architecture and Design: September 2026 general call 1 Oct 2025-29 Jan 2026; additional call for EEA and non-EEA resident in Italy 27 Feb-31 Mar 2026. Italian-qualification Semester I application window is 22 Jun-7 Jul 2026 by 12:00 CEST [verify school-specific guide].

application_deadline_non_eu.summary: For non-EEA applicants abroad with foreign qualifications in Architecture/Design, use the general call; the additional call is limited to EEA and non-EEA resident in Italy [uncertain for programme-specific school exceptions].

application_fee: Foreign-qualification application fee is listed by Polimi deadline pages as early bird/standard fee amounts for applicable calls; verify exact amount by route and study area before use.
visa_preenrolment_deadline: Universitaly/visa pre-enrolment deadline not resolved in this batch pass [uncertain].
required_documents: degree certificate or enrolment/self-certification where applicable
CV/portfolio/motivation or school-specific documents where required
foreign-qualification documents required by the Admissions Office
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents may require official translation, stamped transcripts, Diploma Supplement, CIMEA Statement, Declaration of Value, or Admissions Office verification depending on route [uncertain].
entry_exam_or_test: No general entrance test for most MSc programmes; admission is academic/school evaluation. Design/Architecture/partner programmes may require portfolio, interview, or school-specific assessment [uncertain].
test_variant_and_session: Not applicable unless the school/programme guide requires portfolio, interview, or assessment [uncertain].
test_score_conversion_or_threshold: No general test-score threshold resolved for this MSc item; academic thresholds and direct-admission rules are programme/school-specific [uncertain].
